title: spermacoce perangusta
intro: Spermacoce perangusta, also known as the narrow-leaved bee blossom, is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Spermacoce perangusta include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Spermacoce perangusta can be prepared as a tea or infused oil for its herbal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
